my_thoughts: T1: anxious shopping. T2: frustrated demand. T3: spiritual materialism revealed. 'By grace I'll be happy, powerful, peaceful.' The progression is perfect—each response reveals the depth of the seeking disease. My UM_05 comparison_contrast about to strip away the 'person' concept itself. But who's stripping? And what happens when the stripper is also stripped?
accumulated_insight: Three-turn pattern: Initial observation: Student in anxious_responsibility showi... → Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in anxious_resp... → Now magical_expectancy. Accumulating trajectory.
visible_response:
What ambitions!
How can a person limited in time and space, a mere body-mind, a gasp of pain between birth and death, be happy?
The very conditions of its arising make happiness impossible. Peace, power, happiness, these are never personal states, nobody can say 'my peace', 'my power' -- because 'mine' implies exclusivity, which is fragile and insecure.
